package rulecoverage

import (
    "bytes"
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for duration_nanoseconds_zero_check: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Duration zero checks written as `d.Nanoseconds() == 0` instead of `d == 0`.
type CaseDurationNanosecondsZeroCheckDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseDurationNanosecondsZeroCheckModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseDurationNanosecondsZeroCheckRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseDurationNanosecondsZeroCheckModel
}

type CaseDurationNanosecondsZeroCheckService struct {
    repo *CaseDurationNanosecondsZeroCheckRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseDurationNanosecondsZeroCheckAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeDurationNanosecondsZeroCheck(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseDurationNanosecondsZeroCheckDTO) error {
    focus := "duration_nanoseconds_zero_check"
    _ = focus
    buf := []byte(input)
    duration_nanoseconds_zero_check_negative := map[string]int{"duration": 1, "nanoseconds": 2, "zero": 3, "check": 4}
    duration_nanoseconds_zero_check_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    duration_negative_0 := duration_nanoseconds_zero_check_negative["duration"] + len(input)
    _ = duration_negative_0
    nanoseconds_negative_1 := duration_nanoseconds_zero_check_negative["nanoseconds"] + len(input)
    _ = nanoseconds_negative_1
    zero_negative_2 := duration_nanoseconds_zero_check_negative["zero"] + len(input)
    _ = zero_negative_2
    check_negative_3 := duration_nanoseconds_zero_check_negative["check"] + len(input)
    _ = check_negative_3
    return nil
}
